options.command: FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-synth.js

FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js deploy --require-approval never ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN} ${INSTANCE_DNS:+--context instanceDns=$INSTANCE_DNS} ${CORE_PARAM_PREFIX:+--context coreParamPrefix=$CORE_PARAM_PREFIX}

FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 cdk diff ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN} ${INSTANCE_DNS:+--context instanceDns=$INSTANCE_DNS} ${CORE_PARAM_PREFIX:+--context coreParamPrefix=$CORE_PARAM_PREFIX}

FEATURE_CDK_EMCNOTARY_STACKS_ENABLED=1 node ../../../../dist/libs/infra/config-loader/bin/cdk-deploy.js destroy --force ${DOMAIN:+--context domain=$DOMAIN} ${INSTANCE_DNS:+--context instanceDns=$INSTANCE_DNS} ${CORE_PARAM_PREFIX:+--context coreParamPrefix=$CORE_PARAM_PREFIX}

test:reboot-integration.description: Run comprehensive reboot integration tests (will reboot instance multiple times). Uses AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa}

test:reboot-lambda-only.description: Run only the Lambda invocation test (Test 1) for faster debugging. Uses AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa}

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm nx run admin-stack-info:get

admin:info.description: Get instance stack information (outputs, instance ID, IP, etc.)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} MAX_RESULTS=${MAX_RESULTS:-50} pnpm nx run admin-stack-events:events

AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} FAILED_ONLY=1 pnpm nx run admin-stack-events:events

admin:events:failed.description: Get only failed CloudFormation stack events

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/instance-bootstrap.cli.ts

admin:bootstrap-miab-ec2-instance.description: Bootstrap Mail-in-a-Box (MIAB) to EC2 instance via SSM RunCommand

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/instance-bootstrap.cli.ts --dry-run

admin:bootstrap-miab-ec2-instance:dry-ru.description: Dry run: Preview bootstrap of Mail-in-a-Box (MIAB) to EC2 instance (no SSM command sent). First retrieves stack info via admin:info, then validates with AWS credentials.

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm nx run admin-ssh:setup

admin:ssh:setup.description: Setup SSH access (fetch key from SSM, configure known_hosts)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm nx run admin-ssh:test
pnpm nx run ses-dns:set-dns -- --domain ${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com}

admin:ses-dns.description: Set SES DNS records (DKIM, Mail-From) via Mail-in-a-Box API

options.command: pnpm nx run ses-dns:set-dns -- --domain ${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} --dry-run

admin:ses-dns:dry-run.description: Dry run: Preview SES DNS records without making changes

options.command: DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm nx run instance-provision:provision

admin:provision:ssh-and-ses-dns.description: Provision instance: Setup SSH access and configure SES DNS records

options.command: DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm nx run instance-provision:provision -- --skip-ssh

admin:provision:ses-dns-only.description: Provision instance: Configure SES DNS only (skip SSH setup)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/fix-ssm-agent.cli.ts

admin:fix-ssm-agent.description: Fix SSM agent on existing instance: Install and start SSM agent via SSH (for instances deployed before UserData fix)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/bootstrap-status.cli.ts ${COMMAND_ID:+--command-id $COMMAND_ID} ${TAIL:+--tail $TAIL} ${FOLLOW:+--follow}

admin:bootstrap:status.description: Check bootstrap status: Shows instance status, SSM agent status, and latest/bootstrap command status with prerequisite checks

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} FOLLOW=1 pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tools/tsconfig.json tools/bootstrap-status.cli.ts --follow

admin:bootstrap:status:follow.description: Follow bootstrap status: Continuously monitor bootstrap command status (updates every 10 seconds)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} bash -c 'STACK_INFO=$(pnpm nx run admin-stack-info:get --silent 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(InstanceId|InstancePublicIp|InstanceKeyName)" | head -3); INSTANCE_ID=$(echo "$STACK_INFO" | grep InstanceId | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d " "); INSTANCE_IP=$(echo "$STACK_INFO" | grep InstancePublicIp | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d " "); KEY_NAME=$(echo "$STACK_INFO" | grep InstanceKeyName | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d " " || echo "emcnotary.com-keypair"); KEY_PATH="~/.ssh/${KEY_NAME}.pem"; if [ -n "$INSTANCE_IP" ] && [ -n "$INSTANCE_ID" ]; then echo "📋 Viewing bootstrap logs for instance $INSTANCE_ID"; echo "   IP: $INSTANCE_IP"; echo "   Key: $KEY_PATH"; echo ""; ssh -i "$KEY_PATH" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@"$INSTANCE_IP" "tail -${TAIL:-50} /var/log/mailinabox_setup.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'Log file does not exist yet'"; else echo "❌ Could not get instance information"; exit 1; fi'

admin:bootstrap:logs.description: View bootstrap logs from instance: Shows last N lines of /var/log/mailinabox_setup.log (use TAIL=100 for more lines)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} bash -c 'STACK_INFO=$(pnpm nx run admin-stack-info:get --silent 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(InstanceId|InstancePublicIp|InstanceKeyName)" | head -3); INSTANCE_ID=$(echo "$STACK_INFO" | grep InstanceId | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d " "); INSTANCE_IP=$(echo "$STACK_INFO" | grep InstancePublicIp | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d " "); KEY_NAME=$(echo "$STACK_INFO" | grep InstanceKeyName | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d " " || echo "emcnotary.com-keypair"); KEY_PATH="~/.ssh/${KEY_NAME}.pem"; if [ -n "$INSTANCE_IP" ] && [ -n "$INSTANCE_ID" ]; then echo "📋 Following bootstrap logs for instance $INSTANCE_ID"; echo "   IP: $INSTANCE_IP"; echo "   Press Ctrl+C to stop"; echo ""; ssh -i "$KEY_PATH" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@"$INSTANCE_IP" "tail -f /var/log/mailinabox_setup.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'Log file does not exist yet'"; else echo "❌ Could not get instance information"; exit 1; fi'

admin:bootstrap:logs:follow.description: Follow bootstrap logs: Stream /var/log/mailinabox_setup.log in real-time (Ctrl+C to stop)

options.command: AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} APP_PATH=apps/cdk-emc-notary/instance DOMAIN=${DOMAIN:-emcnotary.com} bash -c 'INSTANCE_ID=$(pnpm nx run admin-stack-info:get --silent 2>/dev/null | grep InstanceId | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d " \"'"); if [ -n "$INSTANCE_ID" ]; then echo "📋 Recent SSM commands for instance $INSTANCE_ID:"; aws ssm list-commands --instance-id "$INSTANCE_ID" --max-items ${MAX_ITEMS:-10} --query "Commands[*].{CommandId:CommandId,Status:Status,RequestedDateTime:RequestedDateTime,DocumentName:DocumentName}" --output table --region ${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} --profile ${AWS_PROFILE:-hepe-admin-mfa}; else echo "❌ Could not get instance ID"; exit 1; fi'

admin:bootstrap:commands.description: List recent SSM commands: Shows last N SSM commands for the instance (use MAX_ITEMS=20 for more)
